# GRWTEE

> GRWTEE (Get Ready With Tee) is a professional styling service based in Lagos, Nigeria. We offer virtual and physical styling: virtual personal styling, wardrobe revamps, event and vacation styling, photoshoot styling, and contract styling. We do not sell clothes; we curate looks and offer personal shopping. Book via our website or DM.

## Contact

- **Website:** https://grwtee.com
- **Bookings:** book@grwtee.com
- **General:** See contact form at https://grwtee.com/contact
- **Instagram:** https://instagram.com/grwtee
- **Location:** Lagos, Nigeria

## Services

- Virtual Personal Styling — curated looks for body type, lifestyle, and style
- Virtual Wardrobe Styling — new looks from your existing wardrobe
- Wardrobe Revamp (in-person) — closet review, edit, and gap-filling
- Virtual Event Styling — special occasions, red carpet, private functions
- Photoshoot Styling — birthday, brand, pre-wedding shoots
- Virtual Vacation Styling — head-to-toe travel looks
- Contract Styling — weekly or monthly retainer for ongoing curated looks

Rates on request. Express styling available at additional cost.

## What We Do Not Do

- We do not sell clothes directly. We offer personal shopping (sourcing and purchasing) based on curated looks from your session.
- We are not limited to African brands; we style across local and international brands.

## Key Information

- **FAQ:** https://grwtee.com/faq
- **Services:** https://grwtee.com/services
- **Book:** https://grwtee.com/book
- **Payment:** https://grwtee.com/payment (Naira/USD; 100% upfront, non-refundable)
- **Terms:** https://grwtee.com/terms
